description: This file defines plugins and utility functions for processing MDX/Markdown files using the 'unified' ecosystem. It includes plugins for replacing configuration placeholders and documentation references within markdown content, supporting migration from Hugo to Astro. The code also manages frontmatter processing and attribute replacements within MDX elements.

methods.name: replaceConfigInText
methods.description: Replaces configuration placeholders in text with actual config values, throwing an error if the value is not found.

methods.name: replaceConfigInAttributes
methods.description: Replaces config placeholders within MDX JSX attributes.

methods.name: replaceDocsrefInText
methods.description: Replaces documentation reference placeholders with versioned documentation paths.

methods.name: replaceDocsrefInAttributes
methods.description: Replaces documentation reference placeholders within MDX JSX attributes.

methods.name: getConfigValueAtPath
methods.description: Retrieves a nested configuration value based on a dot-separated path.

methods.name: replaceInFrontmatter
methods.description: Recursively replaces string values in frontmatter with processed values.

methods.name: containsFrontmatter
methods.description: Checks if the data contains frontmatter with a 'frontmatter' property.
